name: GOLFZON America
about: GOLFZON America is a premier provider of high-tech golf simulator experiences, utilizing advanced sensor technology and Unreal Engine 5 for realistic graphics and ball dynamics. Their simulators are designed for both home and commercial use, featuring high-definition dual sensors like the TwoVision and GDR Sensor to provide accurate swing and ball flight data. The venues offer a range of simulator types for various spaces, from home and garage setups to commercial entertainment spaces with on-site bars and restaurants, catering to both casual players and serious golfers seeking a technologically advanced practice environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced dual sensor technology provides precise data for realistic swing analysis
Unreal Engine 5 graphics offer an immersive experience with lifelike course environments
Variety of game modes including challenges, junior tee-box, and arcade options for different skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available at commercial venues
Full bar available at commercial and entertainment venues

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed, high-definition dual sensors for accurate data collection
Provides accurate and diverse swing analysis data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Commercial venues have on-site kitchens and bars, but outside food and drink policies may vary.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes can vary based on simulator type and pace of play, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golfzon venues feature junior tee-box and arcade modes, making them suitable for family entertainment.
